name: exchange_session_drop
title: Exchange Session Drop
description: Simulates a FIX session drop from an exchange simulator, testing session reconnection logic.
background: The NYSE exchange simulator experiences a connection failure — the TCP session drops after being up for hours. The exchange's outgoing queue is flushed, sequence numbers reset, and any in-flight NewOrderSingle messages are lost. This tests the broker's ability to detect the drop, attempt reconnection, and recover sequence numbers via logon/sequence reset.

steps.action: Verify XNYS exchange simulator session is active
Inject disconnect fault on XNYS exchange
steps.expected_state: XNYS connected_clients drops to 0; session state = disconnected

steps.action: Attempt to route a new order while XNYS is down
steps.expected_state: BrokerHost detects venue unavailable; routes to fallback venue or marks order stuck

steps.action: Reconnect XNYS session and verify reset
steps.expected_state: Logon exchange completes; sequence numbers reset to 1; quotes resume

steps.action: Verify previously stuck orders are re-routed
steps.expected_state: BrokerHost re-processes stuck orders; orders complete via restored venue
